title: Easy Winey Australian Doner Meat Wrap
description: A quick, wine-infused wrap that combines tender doner meat, a splash of red wine, and fresh Australian veggies for a low-glycemic lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced doner and rest meat, cook for 3 minutes until heated through.
Stir in the red wine and balsamic vinegar, letting it reduce for 1 minute.
Transfer the meat mixture to a bowl and season with rosemary, salt, and pepper.
Arrange the lettuce leaves on a clean surface and top each with a quarter of the meat mixture.
Add equal portions of carrots, cucumber, and red cabbage to each leaf.
Fold the sides of the lettuce over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of low-glycemic dipping sauce.
